pre_existing_unrelated_findings.title: run_promote skips selected-backend participation proof on one branch
pre_existing_unrelated_findings.detail: selected_backend_requirement_met becomes true whenever lock_acquired is true, so selected-backend participation is not rechecked on that branch before routing_change_observed can become true.

final_note: The earlier package verify symlink bypass is closed in the current contour diff. C7 itself is canon-safe, while the overall worktree still contains unrelated dirty runtime drift outside this contour.
